changePassword.title: Change My Password
changePassword.success: Your password has been changed successfully.

errors.minLength: New password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.policy: Password must be at least 8 characters and include an uppercase letter, a lowercase letter, a digit and a special character.

passwordReset.title: Local User Password Reset
passwordReset.description: Enter your registered e-mail address. If you are a local user, your new password will be e-mailed to you.
passwordReset.success: Your new password has been sent to your e-mail address.

errors.userManagementContextLoadFailed: Failed to load user management capabilities.
errors.taskClaimFailed: Failed to claim the task from the department pool.
errors.socialConvertFailed: Failed to convert social message to a task.
errors.smsSettingsLoadFailed: Failed to load SMS API settings.
errors.smsSettingsSaveFailed: Failed to save SMS API settings.
errors.fileStorageSettingsLoadFailed: Failed to load file server settings.
errors.fileStorageSettingsSaveFailed: Failed to save file server settings.
errors.slaWeekendSettingsLoadFailed: Failed to load SLA weekend settings.
errors.slaWeekendSettingsSaveFailed: Failed to save SLA weekend settings.

wallboard.title: Pending Tasks
wallboard.subtitle: All manager-approved tasks from internal and external units

login.title: Municipal Communication Center
login.subtitle: Sign in to access social media and task workflows.
login.formDescription: Continue with your authorized staff account.
login.selectTenantHelp: Choose the institution you want to work in.
login.secondFactorNotice: This session will be completed with a verification code.
login.secondFactorSubtitle: Enter the code sent to you to complete sign-in.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Track open workload, recent tasks, and incoming messages on one screen.
dashboard.recentTasksBody: Latest activity and tasks waiting for action.
dashboard.recentMessagesBody: Newest messages and items waiting for routing.
dashboard.quickAreasBody: Jump into the most frequently used work areas.

quickLinks.tasksBody: Create tasks, assign work, and follow status changes.
quickLinks.socialBody: Route incoming messages or convert them into tasks.
quickLinks.departmentsBody: Update units and task target ownership.

departments.title: Departments
departments.subtitle: Manage the department structure and type distribution.
departments.newFormDescription: Add a new unit or directorate.
departments.name: Department Name
departments.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage local and LDAP-linked users from one screen.
users.newFormDescription: Create a local user or link an existing LDAP directory account to the application.
users.additionalDepartmentsHelp: The user can switch the active department from the top-right selector.
users.passwordHint: (Password must be at least 8 characters and include an uppercase letter, a lowercase letter, a special character and a digit.)
users.sourceManualHint: Local users sign in with passwords stored in the application.
users.sourceLdapHint: LDAP users are not auto-created at sign-in; they must be selected from the directory and linked first.
users.directorySearchDescription: Search the LDAP directory, pick a user, then assign department and role before linking.
users.directoryLinkHint: This flow creates a linked application user; only linked LDAP records can sign in.
users.directorySearchPlaceholder: Type at least 2 characters to search LDAP
users.directorySearchEmpty: No matching directory users were found
users.alreadyLinked: This directory user is already linked to an application user.
users.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

create.subtitle: Choose the request type and start a new record with the matching form.
create.internalDescription: Create a request that starts inside your own unit.
create.externalDescription: Create a request that goes to another department.
create.citizenDescription: Create a manual record for a request received from a citizen.
create.ownerUsersHelp: When one or more users are selected, a task is created for each user.
create.ownerUsersEmpty: No selectable active users were found in this department.
create.ownerUsersRequired: Select at least one user for user ownership.
create.departmentOwnershipHelp: The request stays with the department; no automatic task is created.
create.externalFormDescription: Enter the basic details to start an external request record.
create.reporterFormDescription: Enter the basic details to start a request record.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.subtitle: Manage pending approvals, approved requests, and all work in one flow.
tasks.myTasksSubtitle: Track tasks assigned to you by status.
tasks.departmentTasksSubtitle: Track tasks created in your unit by request source.
tasks.staffTasksSubtitle: Track tasks and stages assigned to your staff.

scopeDescriptions.mine: Track tasks assigned to you or otherwise relevant to your day-to-day work.
scopeDescriptions.departmentPool: Review approved requests assigned to your unit but not yet claimed by a person, and claim them when needed.
scopeDescriptions.pendingApproval: Review tasks waiting for an approval or rejection decision in the manager workflow.
scopeDescriptions.all: Browse every task visible to your current role in a single list.

columns.title: Title
columns.routineNoParentRequest: A routine task has no request no

tasks.newFormDescription: Create a new task record and choose the target department.

actions.reporterTaskCancelReturnDenied: You are not authorized to cancel a task requested by a Senior Executive. Contact your manager to return the task.

tasks.returnHelp: Please write a description to return this task.

incomingRequests.subtitle: Track internal incoming unit requests in one list.

social.title: Social Media
social.subtitle: Route incoming messages and convert them into tasks.
social.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this message?

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp Conversations
whatsapp.subtitle: Manage incoming WhatsApp messages from citizens.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage organization info, appearance, social integration, and routing settings.
settings.organizationSectionDescription: Update the display name, domain, and default service level from here.
settings.appearancePreviewDescription: Review how the current color selection will look in the signed-in UI.
settings.appearancePreviewBody: Check the header and sidebar colors here before saving.
settings.appearanceDescription: Edit the color palette used in the login and application shell.
settings.ldapDescription: Manage LDAP connectivity and the admin-driven directory search/link flow per tenant. Missing users are not auto-created during sign-in.
settings.ldapOnboardingNote: LDAP onboarding does not happen on the login screen; it is handled only through the SystemAdmin directory-search and user-link flow.
settings.ldapEnabled: Enable LDAP sign-in and admin import
settings.ldapBindPasswordPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep the current password
settings.ldapPasswordStored: A bind password is already stored.
settings.ldapPasswordMissing: No bind password is stored yet.

workingHours.sectionDescription: Configure default working hours and department-specific exceptions.
workingHours.alwaysOpenHelp: This unit operates 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
workingHours.overrideHelp: Define custom working hours for departments that differ from the default.

sms.sectionDescription: Configure the SMS API used by the system to send messages.
sms.passwordPlaceholder: Enter to change the saved password
sms.originatorHelp: Sender name or number shown on SMS messages (max 11 chars).

syslog.sectionDescription: Forward audit logs to an external Syslog server.

fileStorage.sectionTitle: Server Information for Request and Task Attachments
fileStorage.sectionDescription: Configure the local network or FTP server used to store request and task attachments.
fileStorage.passwordPlaceholder: Enter to replace the saved password

slaWeekend.sectionDescription: Pause SLA time on Saturdays and Sundays. Exempt departments still have SLA progress on weekends.
slaWeekend.excludeWeekends: Pause SLA on Saturday and Sunday
slaWeekend.exemptDepartmentsHelp: Selected departments work on weekends, so their SLA continues to progress.

settings.authDescription: Manage trusted-network automatic sign-in and external-network second-factor rules.
settings.authAutomaticSignInEnabled: Enable automatic sign-in on trusted networks
settings.authRequireSecondFactor: Require second factor outside trusted networks

roles.title: Role Page Permissions
roles.description: Configure which application pages each role can see.
roles.note: This matrix controls page visibility in the user interface. Dashboard remains available to everyone; system settings stay limited to the System Administrator role.
roles.resetSuccess: Role page permissions reset to defaults.

socialConfig.sectionDescription: Manage tenant-level credentials for each channel.
socialConfig.whatsappWebhookHelp: Use this URL in WhatsApp > Configuration, enter the same verify token, then subscribe to the messages field. The URL must be publicly reachable over HTTPS.
socialConfig.whatsappAutoNotify: Notify citizens via WhatsApp on job status changes
socialConfig.whatsappAutoNotifyHelp: Sends an automatic WhatsApp message when a job becomes active, completed, or cancelled.

descriptions.x: Manage complaint, mention, and DM flows coming from X.
descriptions.facebook: Configure credentials for Facebook page messages and comments.
descriptions.instagram: Connect an Instagram Business account and manage DM and mention flows.
descriptions.whatsapp: Define tenant-level credentials for WhatsApp Business integration.
descriptions.edevlet: Define OAuth and redirect settings for e-Government gateway service access.

routing.title: Auto Routing
routing.description: Route messages to the relevant department based on keywords.
routing.rulesDescription: Manage rule priority and target department.
routing.testDescription: Enter a message text to preview which department it will go to.
routing.testSuccess: This message will be routed to the "{{department}}" department.
routing.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this rule?

citizen.sectionDescription: Manually create a citizen request record. This is intended for requests received outside of social media integrations.
citizen.contentPlaceholder: Enter the content of the citizen request...

municipalityLocation.sectionDescription: Select a district to determine the neighborhood list shown in the create request screen.

pwa.updateReady: A new version is ready. Reload to switch to the latest UI.

placeholder.title: This area is still under development
placeholder.description: Content for this surface will be completed as the workflow and screen details are finalized.

auditLog.title: Audit Trail
auditLog.subtitle: Full history of all actions on this record

jobs.subtitle: Track external incoming requests, manage coordinating departments, and follow assignments.
jobs.myRequestsSubtitle: Track the requests you created by status.
jobs.outgoingSubtitle: Track requests sent from your unit to other units by status.

actions.assignStaffHelp: Select the staff to assign this request to.
actions.returnHelp: Please write a description to return this request.

form.title: Job Title
form.targetDepartments: Which Department Does the Request Go To
form.targetDepartmentsHelp: Select the department(s) the request will be sent to.

attachments.uploadHint: JPG, PNG, PDF, Office — max 5 MB
attachments.dragHint: Drop file here or click to browse
attachments.errorSize: File size must not exceed 5 MB.
attachments.errorType: Only image (JPG, PNG), PDF and Office files are allowed.
attachments.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this attachment?
attachments.lockedApproved: Attachments can no longer be added because the request is approved.
attachments.lockedCancelled: Attachments can no longer be added because the request is cancelled.
attachments.lockedCompleted: Attachments can no longer be added because the task is completed.
